title: Slow Your Roll: Basic Weapons Compatibility
description: A mod adding compatibility between Slow Your Roll and Basic Weapons.
body:
## Description
This is a small mod that bridges [Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll) and [Basic Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/basicweapons).

### Features:
- Flint Basic Weapons set
- Copper Basic Weapons set
- Basic Weapons recipes changed to use items from Slow Your Roll
- Basic Weapons wooden and stone sets made uncraftable
- Requires [Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll) and [Basic Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/basicweapons) to be installed

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
